auth.registerSubtitle: 7 din free trial — no credit card

index.backup_file_mein_aap_ka_tamam_data_hota_: Backup file mein aap ka tamam data hota hai (products, customers, sales, etc). Iss file ko safe jagah save karein. Cloud storage (Google Drive, iCloud) ya email mein save karna recommended hai.
index.sirf_wo_products_labels_mein_dikhenge_ji: Sirf wo products labels mein dikhenge jin ka barcode set hai
index.products_mein_barcode_add_karein_phir_ya: Products mein barcode add karein, phir yahan print kar sakte hain
index.pehle_products_mein_barcode_add_karein: Pehle products mein barcode add karein
index.service_active_rakhne_ke_liye_pay_karein: Service active rakhne ke liye pay karein
index.din_shuru_karne_se_pehle_apna_opening_ca: Din shuru karne se pehle apna opening cash count enter karein
index.hamari_support_team_urdu_english_aur_rom: Hamari support team Urdu, English aur Roman Urdu mein available hai. Fastest reply ke liye WhatsApp use karein.
index.koi_customer_udhaar_mein_nahi_hai: Koi customer udhaar mein nahi hai
index.aap_ka_data_secure_aur_encrypted_hai_hum: Aap ka data secure aur encrypted hai. Hum aap ki privacy ka khayal rakhte hain.
index.koi_product_low_stock_par_nahi_hai: Koi product low stock par nahi hai
index.har_sale_par_customer_ko_points_milte_ha: Har sale par customer ko points milte hain
index.customers_ko_whatsapp_pe_receipts_bhejne: Customers ko WhatsApp pe receipts bhejne ke liye
index.aap_ke_business_ke_liye_suggested: Aap ke business ke liye suggested
index.apne_pehle_2_3_products_quickly_add_kare: Apne pehle 2-3 products quickly add karein. Aap baad mein Products section se aur add kar sakte hain.
index.apne_staff_cashier_manager_ko_add_karein: Apne staff (cashier/manager) ko add karein taake wo bhi POS use kar saken. Aap baad mein Team section se aur add kar sakte hain.
index.mubarak_ho_aap_ka_shop_ready_hai: 🎉 Mubarak ho! Aap ka shop ready hai!
index.sale_ki_receipt_se_return_process_karein: Sale ki receipt se return process karein
index.apni_dukan_ki_har_cheez_customize_karein: Apni dukan ki har cheez customize karein
index.add_your_first_brand_to_get_started: Add your first brand to get started
index.drawer_mein_actual_cash_gin_lo_phir_nich: Drawer mein actual cash gin lo, phir niche enter karo. System expected amount se difference batayega.
index.files_automatically_download_honge_aur_s: Files automatically download honge aur share menu khulega. Excel files MS Excel, Google Sheets ya Numbers mein open kar sakte hain.
index.account_mein_points_kabhi_expire_nahi_ho: Account mein points kabhi expire nahi hote
index.customer_points_use_karke_discount_le_sa: Customer points use karke discount le sakta hai
index.settings_mein_loyalty_enable_karein_cust: Settings mein loyalty enable karein, customers automatically points earn karenge
index.sirf_verification_ke_liye_kabhi_share_na: Sirf verification ke liye — kabhi share nahi hoga
index.sales_hone_par_profit_calculate_hoga: Sales hone par profit calculate hoga
index.for_every_successful_referral_get_reward: For every successful referral, get rewarded
index.sales_hone_par_yahan_beautiful_analytics: Sales hone par yahan beautiful analytics dikhega
index.stock_changes_ka_pura_record_yahan_dikhe: Stock changes ka pura record yahan dikhega
index.add_tags_like_organic_halal_premium_impo: Add tags like organic, halal, premium, imported
index.sirf_owner_team_members_add_aur_manage_k: Sirf Owner team members add aur manage kar sakta hai

pos.udhaar_ke_liye_customer_select_karein: Udhaar ke liye customer select karein
pos.customer_select_karein_takay_credit_trac: ⚠️ Customer select karein takay credit track ho

security.apne_login_methods_aur_security_manage_k: Apne login methods aur security manage karein
security.aap_ke_account_mein_at_least_ek_login_me: Aap ke account mein at least ek login method active hona chahiye. Dono methods active rakhne se aap kabhi bhi login kar sakte hain.
security.ab_aap_email_password_se_bhi_login_kar_s: Ab aap email/password se bhi login kar sakenge
security.hum_aap_ke_email_pe_6_digit_code_bhejeng: Hum aap ke email pe 6 digit code bhejenge
security.code_bhej_diya_gaya_email_pe: Code bhej diya gaya email pe

changepassword.apne_account_ko_secure_rakhne_ke_liye_st: Apne account ko secure rakhne ke liye strong password use karein

forgotpassword.apna_registered_email_enter_karein_hum_a: Apna registered email enter karein. Hum aap ko ek reset link bhej denge jis se aap naya password set kar sakte hain.

googlecomplete.continue_karke_aap_terms_aur_privacy_pol: Continue karke aap Terms aur Privacy Policy se agree karte hain.

login.login_karein_aur_apni_dukan_ka: Login karein aur apni dukan ka

register.aap_ke_friend_ko_reward_milega: Aap ke friend ko reward milega

register.7_din_free_no_credit_card_cancel_anytime: 7 din free • No credit card • Cancel anytime

resetpassword.ye_link_valid_nahi_hai_naya_reset_reques: Ye link valid nahi hai. Naya reset request karein.
resetpassword.ab_aap_naye_password_se_login_kar_sakte_: Ab aap naye password se login kar sakte hain.
resetpassword.3_second_mein_login_par_redirect_ho_jaye: 3 second mein login par redirect ho jayega...

verifyotp.apna_inbox_check_karein_aur_6_digit_ka_c: Apna inbox check karein aur 6 digit ka code yahan enter karein. Code 10 minutes ke liye valid hai.

id.ye_invoice_paid_ho_chuki_hai_aap_ki_subs: Ye invoice paid ho chuki hai. Aap ki subscription active hai.

edit.images_aur_variants_ke_liye_full_editor_: Images aur variants ke liye full editor jald aa raha hai

customerId.payment_ke_baad_customer_ka_udhaar: Payment ke baad customer ka udhaar

new.baad_mein_images_variants_edit_screen_se: 💡 Baad mein images & variants edit screen se add karein
new.name: Name
new.search_by_sale_number_or_customer: Search by sale number or customer...

section.language_change_ke_baad_app_restart_maan: 💡 Language change ke baad app restart maang sakta hai RTL layout ke liye.
section.theme_select_karte_hi_fauran_apply_ho_ja: 💡 Theme select karte hi fauran apply ho jayega. Save button cloud par bhi sync karega.
